name: AI HTML Decks
description: Build browser-native presentation decks with Cursor + Claude instead of Google Slides. Ship as a standalone .html file or host on a Quick Site — no Google account required.
built_with: HTML + CSS + JS (AI-generated via Cursor + Claude)
author: Matt Ward, Brandon Anderson

name: B2B Field Learnings
description: Field-validated B2B edge cases, API patterns, and workarounds from the SE team. Searchable by category (Payments, APIs, Workflows, Tax, Integrations, Platform) with inline code samples.
author: B2B SE Team

name: Launch Inspector
description: Monitor Shopify merchant launch progress across DTC and B2B — Salesforce cases, store data, revenue targets, and recommendations in one place
author: Jordan Murphy

name: Agency Intel
description: Research and intelligence on Shopify agency partners — capabilities, specializations, and track records
author: Jordan Murphy

name: B2B Sales Hub
description: Centralized hub for B2B sales resources, playbooks, and enablement materials
author: Lizzie Ficken

name: Demo Prep
description: Auto-populates demo preparation data from Salesforce and merchant context for upcoming calls
author: Dustin Floer

name: Discovery Prep
description: AI-powered discovery call preparation with tailored questions and merchant research
author: Matt Ward

name: Simulations
description: Interactive merchant-facing simulations for B2B sales scenarios and product demonstrations
author: Matt Ward
